desc: Implement references --symbol query through traversal occurrence and SCIP reference-relationship lookup, replacing unimplementedHandler with a production handler that accepts an exact full SCIP symbol, returns reference occurrences for the exact symbol and is_reference-related symbols excluding definitions, preserves the queried symbol in the response envelope, and validates with deterministic golden JSON
done_when: scip-search references --index <fixture> --symbol <exact-scip-symbol> exits 0 with no stderr and emits a JSON payload containing the queried symbol at top level plus a references array where each entry has the matched occurrence symbol, document path, SCIP 0-based range, and symbol role context; reference occurrences exclude SymbolRole.Definition occurrences; SCIP is_reference relationship targets are included alongside direct occurrences; a valid exact symbol with no matching references returns status 0 with an empty references array and the queried symbol preserved; missing --symbol and empty --symbol value return status 2 usage failures; results are in stable deterministic order; golden JSON tests validate the production command path through cmd/scip-search; references no longer returns query execution is not implemented; make test passes
scope: cmd/scip-search/main.go references handler wiring replacing unimplementedHandler, new internal/query/references package with traversal-backed reference occurrence and relationship query, reference-specific fixture data extending shared traversal fixtures, golden JSON test files, cmd/scip-search/main_test.go reference command tests. Out of scope: implementations command, discovery package changes, traversal view API changes, install scripts, documentation changes

desc: Implement implementations --symbol query through incoming is_implementation relationship lookup on the traversal view, replacing unimplementedHandler with a production handler that accepts an exact full SCIP symbol, returns implementer symbols whose SCIP is_implementation relationships point at the queried symbol with definition document paths and ranges when available, excludes outgoing and synthesized relationships, preserves the queried symbol in the response envelope, and validates with deterministic golden JSON
done_when: scip-search implementations --index <fixture> --symbol <exact-scip-symbol> exits 0 with no stderr and emits a JSON payload containing the queried symbol at top level plus an implementations array where each entry has the implementation symbol, the incoming is_implementation relationship basis, and definition document path and SCIP 0-based range when the traversal provides a definition occurrence; outgoing is_implementation relationships from the queried symbol are not returned as implementation results; synthesized inverse edges are not returned; a valid exact symbol with no incoming implementations returns status 0 with an empty implementations array and the queried symbol preserved; missing --symbol and empty --symbol value return status 2 usage failures; results are in stable deterministic order; golden JSON tests validate the production command path through cmd/scip-search; implementations no longer returns query execution is not implemented; make test passes
scope: cmd/scip-search/main.go implementations handler wiring replacing unimplementedHandler, new internal/query/implementations package with traversal-backed incoming implementation relationship query, implementation-specific fixture data extending shared traversal fixtures, golden JSON test files, cmd/scip-search/main_test.go implementation command tests. Out of scope: references command, discovery package changes, traversal view API changes, install scripts, documentation changes
